tools.name: Erkul Games (DPS Calculator)
tools.description: Ship loadout planner and DPS calculator. The reference tool for builds.

tools.name: FleetYards
tools.description: Ship database with detailed specs and component slots.

tools.name: Ship Matrix (Official)
tools.description: Official CIG ship specs. Authoritative but updated slowly.

tools.name: CCU Game
tools.description: CCU upgrade path finder — calculates the cheapest chain of upgrades to reach a target ship.

tools.name: Hangar.link
tools.description: Track and manage your ship collection by linking your RSI account.

tools.name: StarShip 42
tools.description: 3D ship viewer with size comparisons and detailed breakdowns.

tools.name: SPViewer
tools.description: Ship performance database — fuel, endurance, capacitors and component stats with side-by-side comparisons.

tools.name: UEX Corp
tools.description: Commodities, prices, trade routes, refineries. Community-driven, very complete.

tools.name: SC Trade Tools
tools.description: Trade route optimizer with profit calculations.

tools.name: Regolith Co
tools.description: Mining co-op tracker, refinery planner and mineral price database.

tools.name: Cargo Grid Viewer
tools.description: Visualise and compare ship cargo grids, with a finder for which vehicles fit a given set of containers.

tools.name: SC Unpacked
tools.description: Raw game data extracted from each patch.

tools.name: SCMDB
tools.description: Star Citizen Mission Database — missions, rewards, reputation paths, blueprints and crafting resources.

tools.name: CStone: Universal Item Finder
tools.description: Find where any in-game item or component is sold, and at what price.

tools.name: Star Citizen Wiki
tools.description: Largest community-maintained wiki.

tools.name: RSI Starmap
tools.description: Official 3D star map of the persistent universe.

tools.name: Cornerstone
tools.description: Aaron Halo travel routes, planetary surveys and navigation planning.

tools.name: VerseTime
tools.description: Live in-game local time, sunrise and sunset for planets and moons.

tools.name: RSI Spectrum
tools.description: Official forum and chat platform for orgs and players.

tools.name: r/starcitizen
tools.description: Main Star Citizen subreddit.

tools.name: Imperial News Network (INN)
tools.description: Independent Star Citizen news outlet covering patches, lore and dev updates.

tools.name: RSI Status
tools.description: Official live status of RSI / Star Citizen servers and services.
